nasb.text: and there shall be one-tenth of an ephah of fine flour mixed with one-fourth of a hin of beaten oil, and one-fourth of a hin of wine for a drink offering with one lamb.

esv.text: And with the first lamb a tenth measure of fine flour mingled with a fourth of a hin of beaten oil, and a fourth of a hin of wine for a drink offering.

cnv.text: 和這一隻羊同獻的，要用一公斤細麵與一公升榨成的油混和，又要用一公升酒作奠祭。

ccb.text: 要用一公斤细面粉调一升橄榄油做成素祭，与早晨献的羊羔一同献上，再献上一升酒作奠祭。
